content.en:
"Then go to the Realm of the Realm of the Gods first!"

Ye Tian decided.

Immediately, he took out the Boundary Court Order, and after urging it, he formed a passage straight into the realm of the Realm of Gods.

......

Boundary Court Headquarters.

Ye Tian came to this vicinity, unlike the Boundary Court Branch of the Eternal Realm, the Boundary Court Headquarters was surrounded by an incomparably large Eternal Realm.

This Eternal Realm turned out to be an Eternal Realm composed of the Eternal Dao Realm, the creatures here, the weakest are the Eternal Dao Realm, and the Eternal Dao Realm that has been cultivated into the Eternal Dao Species is also very common, and even the existence of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm is all over the street.

It is conceivable that such an incomparably huge eternal realm has many Eternal Dao Realms and half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms within it.

Even the existence of the Eternal Realm God Realm is not uncommon here, and it is easy to encounter.

The reason why so many Eternal Realm God Realms have gathered here is naturally because the headquarters of the Realm Court is here, and this is the safest place.

Even if the Demon Seed Abyss invades, it is impossible to break through here.

So, there's almost no need to worry about the Demon Seed when you stay here.

However, it is not necessarily a good thing to live here permanently, for example, there are few opportunities here, and you still have to go out often.

If you want to live with salted fish, this is indeed a good place.

"Eternal Yang Kingdom!"

This is the name of this eternal country.

Ye Tian was standing in a large hall in the Eternal Yang Kingdom at this moment, and after he walked out, he went to the headquarters of the Realm Court.

Soon, he came to the Boundary Court Headquarters, took out the Boundary Court Order, plus the token handled by the Boundary Court Branch, and directly entered the Boundary Court Headquarters.

The area of the Realm Court Headquarters is ten times the size of the Eternal Realm Realm Branch, and there are many Eternal Realm Divine Realm beginner-level powerhouses here, and even the Eternal Realm Divine Realm middle-level powerhouses can occasionally be seen.

He had only come here to inquire about the relocation of the Eternal Realm from the Eternal Realm to the Realm of the Gods.

Soon, Ye Tian learned some information, as well as some information about the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.

According to his understanding, the area of the Realm God Realm is not as large as the Eternal Realm, which is only equivalent to one-third of the Eternal Realm, but it is still extremely large.

It's just that almost all of the Eternal Realm are death zones, while there is no Death Zone in the Realm God Realm, but in ordinary places, its resources and energy are not as rich as those of the Eternal Realm.

There are only a few realms whose resources and energy levels are beyond the average Eternal Realm.

"It seems that for the ordinary Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, entering the realm of the Realm God does not mean that the cultivation environment is good. It's just that there is a inheritance to the Eternal Realm God Realm here, and there are still many opportunities, but in terms of the cultivation environment, many places are also at the level of the ordinary Eternal Realm. Ye Tianming enlightened.

Other than that.

Many of the good territories in the realm of the Realm God Realm have been occupied by one eternal realm after another, and the rest are not very good places.

There are no treasures in those places, the environment is average, and there are even certain dangers.

The Eternal Kingdom Realm has demon seeds, and the Realm God Kingdom also has demon seeds, but the too powerful demon seeds have been killed, but there are still fish that have slipped through the net.

In addition, there are cracks between some areas of the realm of the realm of the god kingdom and the abyss of the demon seed, and the demon seeds in the abyss of the demon seed may break into the realm of the realm of the god at any time.

So if you're unlucky, those areas will fall.

For example, this time, the Demon Seed Abyss invaded the realm of the god realm, and many eternal realms were destroyed, but most of the eternal realms that were destroyed were those that had a bad environment.

Of course, there are also some eternal realms with good geographical locations and good cultivation, which have also been destroyed in this invasion, and some good places have also been vacated.

If Ye Tian wanted to relocate an eternal realm in the Endless Realm Alliance to the realm of the Realm God Realm, he could choose those good places.

......

Ye Tian left the Realm Court Headquarters and went to inspect those areas.

After a long journey, he came to a place that had been destroyed not long ago.

There are ruins everywhere, but from the energy emanating from this area, it can be seen that the energy here is still very abundant, and there are many treasures nearby.

"The resources here are better than those in the Endless Realm, but not much better!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he continued to explore.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Ye Tian has been to a lot of places, but the situation in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom is not as good as he imagined, maybe there are treasures with a lot of resources, but they are all occupied by major forces, and the treatment of ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm or Eternal Realm in the Realm God Realm is slightly better than that of the Eternal Realm Realm, and it is not as good as imagined.

After a period of time, Ye Tian already had a certain understanding of the realm of the Realm of Gods.

"The realm of the Realm God is just a lot of opportunities, a little more opportunities, and the inheritance is perfect, but for the Eternal Dao realm, the realm of the realm of the realm is not necessarily good. But the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, in the Realm God Realm Realm, there are indeed more chances to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, but the competition will also be greater!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After thinking about it, he was still ready to relocate one Eternal Realm to the Realm God Realm, but only one would be moved, and there was no need for the other Eternal Realms to be relocated to the Realm God Realm.

It's just that those people in the Eternal Realm, once they come to the Realm God Realm, they can't easily return, and even the Eternal Realm God Realm, if they want to go back, they have to apply.

As long as there is a reason, you can apply for approval.

Like Ye Tian himself, the Eternal Realm Divine Realm (Wang Li's) of the Eternal Realm Realm, it is naturally easy to return now.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian is like the Realm Court Headquarters applying to relocate an eternal realm to the realm of the Realm God Realm, and he has chosen a location.

Next, the Boundary Court Headquarters sent several Eternal Realm God Realms to choose a good location to set up a traction formation to pull the Eternal Kingdom of the Eternal Realm here, and the entire process must be under the supervision of the Realm Realm Headquarters to prevent creatures from outside the Eternal Realm from breaking in.

... Sharp...

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian is going to relocate an eternal realm to the realm of the god realm, if he is willing to go, he will apply, if he is not willing to go, he will transfer to other eternal realms, and the number is limited, it is impossible to let all the human beings pass.

After some application and screening, a group of humans were selected, and then registered, and soon they will enter the realm of the gods with this eternal realm.
